task_completion.description: Verify Page 1 contains the title and definition of photosynthesis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page displaying the word 'Photosynthesis' as a title and text describing it as the process by which plants make their own food.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 contains a yellow sun and a green plant representation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page showing a yellow circle or ellipse representing the sun, and a green shape or drawing representing a plant.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 has arrows pointing toward the plant with correct input labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows visually pointing TOWARD the green plant shape, accompanied by the text labels 'Sunlight', 'Water', and 'Carbon Dioxide'.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 has arrows pointing away from the plant with correct output labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows visually pointing AWAY FROM the green plant shape, accompanied by the text labels 'Oxygen' and 'Glucose'.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 3 contains the correct chemical word equation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page displaying the exact text: 'Carbon Dioxide + Water + Sunlight -> Glucose + Oxygen'.

task_completion.description: Verify the flipchart is saved with the correct name and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire window title bar or a 'Save As' dialog showing the file named 'photosynthesis_lesson.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire application GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire application interface (toolbars, page browser, canvas) should be visible in the screenshots, rather than a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent constructed the diagram using native shapes and text boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the agent using ActivInspire's shape tools (circle, arrows) and text box tools, rather than pasting a single pre-made image of the photosynthesis process from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not be used to directly write or manipulate the .flipchart binary/archive file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart file saved exactly at /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/photosynthesis_lesson.flipchart. Page 1 must have the title 'Photosynthesis' and a definition. Page 2 must have a yellow sun (circle/ellipse), a green plant shape, arrows pointing to the plant labeled 'Sunlight', 'Water', 'Carbon Dioxide', and arrows pointing away labeled 'Oxygen', 'Glucose'. Page 3 must contain the equation 'Carbon Dioxide + Water + Sunlight -> Glucose + Oxygen'.
